！！！","text_exts":[{"e":38,"s":35,"text":"赴山海","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B5%B4%E5%B1%B1%E6%B5%B7&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742049312DA57EB4%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227566178663971439422%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227549898587610549272%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B5%B4%E5%B1%B1%E6%B5%B7%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761642849,"group_id":"7549898587610549272","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxBD67zeJ8a/qI0noHevy7iCVdZPCqKibvpNyM+H+LAH","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3c10eeac854f4535a1d156902739ab8a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790498&x-signature=AJ9uaX60kbhu2CzcL0IWvzG6x00%3D","user_id":"3712418787630620","user_name":"忆雨云歌"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3712418787630620","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1775140568,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7549898587610549272","book_info":{"abstract":"【短剧我科技大佬怎么变成高中生了也上线～】（评分刚出，后面会涨的）【科技+单女主+双重生+金手指】
一位因心梗重生于高三学期的航空天才，带着来自未来的庞大知识库，决心弥补前世的遗憾，并助力华夏崛起。
重返17岁，他看似仍是那个轻松考取状元的学神，与青梅竹马及一众发小嬉笑打闹。然而，在他书房紧锁的门后，进行的却是足以改变国家命运的创造。他的才华很快被家中长辈察觉，并引来了国家的关注。从此，少年与他志同道合的伙伴们开启了一条非凡的成长之路。
大学期间他们隐于校园，却已是国家六代机项目的秘密大脑；毕业后他们向一个个科技高峰发起冲锋：1纳米芯片、可控核聚变、人工智能、空天战机、南天门计划……
他们的征途是星辰大海：从可控核聚变到量子计算机，从碳基芯片到国产系统；从深海的核潜艇到劈波斩浪的航母舰队；从遥远的空间站到畅通无阻的量子通信……
这是一群少年以智慧为笔、以青春为墨，书写“以我少年意气，许国万里恒昌”的壮丽篇章。他们用一个个颠覆性的科技成果，告诉世界：华夏崛起，未来已来！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4fb8f70e59eff520649e85586a9ae426","author":"逃离人海","author_id":"","book_id":"7549898587610549272","book_name":"科技巅峰：从高考开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#183040","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7551020562621940248","read_count":"24745","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"947874"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.7","serial_count":"412","tags":"都市种田,都市,重生,天才,学霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o7ac853cc3e84da142e26d238c4dde326~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779388931&x-signature=8vuzA2fW74AKlnuBgKnAeWswOi4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1939977903813592","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"47"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323024211AB946FAC674C2DA57EB4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读58分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3506,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5248}, -鸿钧道祖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"108127970472","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1775094807,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7549898587610549272","book_info":{"abstract":"【短剧我科技大佬怎么变成高中生了也上线～】（评分刚出，后面会涨的）【科技+单女主+双重生+金手指】
一位因心梗重生于高三学期的航空天才，带着来自未来的庞大知识库，决心弥补前世的遗憾，并助力华夏崛起。
重返17岁，他看似仍是那个轻松考取状元的学神，与青梅竹马及一众发小嬉笑打闹。然而，在他书房紧锁的门后，进行的却是足以改变国家命运的创造。他的才华很快被家中长辈察觉，并引来了国家的关注。从此，少年与他志同道合的伙伴们开启了一条非凡的成长之路。
大学期间他们隐于校园，却已是国家六代机项目的秘密大脑；毕业后他们向一个个科技高峰发起冲锋：1纳米芯片、可控核聚变、人工智能、空天战机、南天门计划……
他们的征途是星辰大海：从可控核聚变到量子计算机，从碳基芯片到国产系统；从深海的核潜艇到劈波斩浪的航母舰队；从遥远的空间站到畅通无阻的量子通信……
这是一群少年以智慧为笔、以青春为墨，书写“以我少年意气，许国万里恒昌”的壮丽篇章。他们用一个个颠覆性的科技成果，告诉世界：华夏崛起，未来已来！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4fb8f70e59eff520649e85586a9ae426","author":"逃离人海","author_id":"","book_id":"7549898587610549272","book_name":"科技巅峰：从高考开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#183040","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7551020562621940248","read_count":"24745","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"947874"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.7","serial_count":"412","tags":"都市种田,都市,重生,天才,学霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o7ac853cc3e84da142e26d238c4dde326~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779388931&x-signature=8vuzA2fW74AKlnuBgKnAeWswOi4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1939977903813592","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"134"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323024211AB946FAC674C2DA57EB4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":22912,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":6690}
